creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: antoine->mat

Over to mat:  lots of extensions fail to package 

pkg-static: lstat(/wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/p5-DBI/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.20/mach/auto/DBI/DBI.bs): No such file or directory
